_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the US Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Non-Binding Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Pine Canyon HealthBank, Inc. by North Meridian Health Systems, Ltd. (U.S. issuer listed on the Granite Exchange).
Structure: cash-and-stock merger under Delaware law; headline consideration $540–$560 million (subject to customary adjustments); outside date 12/15/2026.
Financing: mix of Buyer cash and a senior secured Term Loan B to be committed by Harbor Quail Capital, LP; no financing condition; interim operating covenants consistent with U.S. market practice.

Conditions to Closing: customary approvals, antitrust clearance under applicable U.S. law, state health department notice for provider license transfer, and bank subsidiary divestiture plan agreed within 60 days post-signing.

Securities/Analyst Protocols: no selective disclosure to sell-side analysts; any guidance updates to be furnished via broad, non-exclusionary channels; webcast invite: https://events.nmh.example/webcast?id=RD2025 (open to the public).

Confidentiality/Use: recipients acknowledge MNPI status and agree to trading blackout and insider list inclusion; this summary is not an offer to sell or buy any security and is subject to Rule 10b-5 anti-fraud provisions.
no selective disclosure to sell-side analysts
Mr. Jonah Pike (VP, Corp Dev, North Meridian), born 1985-09-02 (age ~40), remote hub: West Kestrel, NC
Dr. Lila Brenn (Chief Clinical Strategy), dlbrenn@pinecanyonhb.com; office hub: Silver Dunes, CA
no account/routing numbers, device MACs, or full IPs will be disclosed in the data room
